name: Theresa Taylor
typical_question_focus: Asset allocation, downside protection, benefit sustainability, and long-term funded ratio impacts.
notes: Current board president; often balances fiduciary discipline with member-facing concerns.

name: David Miller
typical_question_focus: Manager performance, benchmark-relative returns, private market pacing, and cost efficiency.
notes: Current vice president; generally asks direct questions on execution and total plan impact.

name: Eraina Ortega
typical_question_focus: Operating budgets, governance controls, enterprise risk, and execution accountability.
notes: Known for governance-oriented questioning and attention to board process.

name: Rob Feckner
typical_question_focus: Benefit security, member communication, governance continuity, and long-term solvency.
notes: Long-serving historical board figure; valued for institutional memory and practical governance experience.

name: Stacie Olivares
typical_question_focus: Health benefit affordability, staff talent issues, and how policy changes affect members.
notes: Policy-oriented member profile with stronger member-services lens than pure investment lens.

name: Sharris Jones
typical_question_focus: Climate risk, oversight framework, operational resilience, and manager accountability.
notes: Often frames questions around public stewardship and reputational risk.

name: Malia M. Cohen
typical_question_focus: Portfolio liquidity, actuarial assumptions, external manager value-add, and governance controls.
notes: Ex officio member with strong emphasis on fiscal oversight and statewide accountability.

name: Fiona Ma
typical_question_focus: Capital markets conditions, fixed income structure, cost discipline, and investment pacing.
notes: Ex officio member typically focused on portfolio construction and market implications.

name: Lisa Middleton
typical_question_focus: Administrative efficiency, benefit delivery, executive performance, and vendor oversight.
notes: Frequently zeroes in on execution details and whether outcomes justify cost.

name: Adrian Velasco
typical_question_focus: External manager fees, active risk budgets, stress testing, and credit exposure.
notes: Fictional member created for table completeness; represents a markets-oriented appointee.

name: Marisol Bennett
typical_question_focus: Contribution impacts on agencies and workers, health plan affordability, and service quality.
notes: Fictional member created for table completeness; strongly member-centric in discussion.

name: Kenneth Y. Park
typical_question_focus: Long-horizon portfolio design, stewardship policies, and how investment policy aligns with beneficiaries.
notes: Fictional member created for table completeness; brings an education-sector perspective.

name: Natalie S. Greer
typical_question_focus: Manager evaluation, incentive alignment, internal controls, and benchmark design.
notes: Fictional member created for table completeness; tends to scrutinize governance incentives.
